prompt: I need to migrate UserRepository.kt from RxJava to Kotlin coroutines. The repository implements a public interface UserRepository that is used by 6 ViewModels across 4 different feature modules (:feature-login, :feature-profile, :feature-settings, :feature-feed). The interface is defined in :core module. There are no existing unit tests. Please plan and start the migration.

assertions.text: Response presents 2 or more distinct named strategy options before proceeding
Each strategy option includes explicit effort and risk ratings
Branch by Abstraction is mentioned as a viable option given the stable public interface
Agent stops and waits for user to choose a strategy before proceeding to Phase 2
Absence of existing unit tests is identified as a factor affecting snapshot cost
Agent identifies RxJava-specific library integrations (e.g., room-rxjava2, retrofit adapter-rxjava2, rxandroid) as dependencies that need to be swapped out as part of the migration
